title: The Straw Hats Meet Elbaf’s Danger
description: On pages 14–15, this part follows Unknown person #13, Usopp, Loki, Unknown person #14 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.text: "On a curious day when Thunder and Snow both flurry!!!"
